title: Sakana: Fable 5 Intelligence WITHOUT Fable 5!
summary: Sakana released Fugu, a multi-agent orchestration system with a standard and higher-end "Fugu Ultra" variant that uses panel-style synthesis of multiple model responses. The system is accessible via a single model API and reportedly matches frontier models like Claude and others on benchmarks.
writeup: This video covers Sakana's release of Fugu, a multi-agent orchestration system available in a standard version and a higher-end "Fugu Ultra" variant that uses panel-style synthesis to combine multiple model responses. It matters because the system is accessible through a single model API and reportedly matches frontier models such as Claude on benchmarks, suggesting orchestration over multiple responses can rival larger individual models. Key takeaways: Fugu leans on agent orchestration and test-time compute, with Ultra synthesizing a panel of outputs rather than relying on one model pass.
